title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Shaadi.com Global Group

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Shaadi.com Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Shaadi.com Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shaadi.com Global Group:
Shaadi.com Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com Global Group!
